name: Find-PackageProvider

options.name: -AllVersions
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet returns all available versions of the package provider. By default, `Find-PackageProvider` only returns the newest available version.

options.name: -Credential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to search for package providers.

options.name: -Force
options.description: Forces the command to run without asking for user confirmation. Currently, this is equivalent to the ForceBootstrap parameter.

options.name: -ForceBootstrap
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet forces Package Management to automatically install the package provider.

options.name: -IncludeDependencies
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet includes dependencies.

options.name: -MaximumVersion
options.description: Specifies the maximum allowed version of the package provider that you want to find. If you do not add this parameter, `Find-PackageProvider` finds the highest available version of the provider.

options.name: -MinimumVersion
options.description: Specifies the minimum allowed version of the package provider that you want to find. If you do not add this parameter, `Find-PackageProvider` finds the highest available version of the package that also satisfies any maximum specified version specified by the MaximumVersion parameter.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies one or more package provider module names, or provider names with wildcard characters. Separate multiple package names with commas.

options.name: -Proxy
options.description: Specifies a proxy server for the request, rather than connecting directly to the Internet resource.

options.name: -ProxyCredential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to use the proxy server that is specified by the Proxy parameter.

options.name: -RequiredVersion
options.description: Specifies the exact allowed version of the package provider that you want to find. If you do not add this parameter, `Find-PackageProvider` finds the highest available version of the provider that also satisfies any maximum version specified by the MaximumVersion parameter.

options.name: -Source
options.description: Specifies one or more package sources. You can get a list of available package sources by using the `Get-PackageSource` cmdlet.

description: Returns a list of Package Management package providers available for installation.
